```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_Heatmap_data_expressed_HalfSamplesPerSpeciesPerDay, fig.height=6,fig.width=6}
sample_annot_expressed <- sample_annot_expressed[colnames(mat_expressed), ]

rownames(sample_annot_expressed) <- sample_annot_expressed$Sample
sample_annot_expressed <- sample_annot_expressed[, c("Timepoint", "Species", "Individual")]

annotation_colors = list(
  Timepoint  = ann_colors$timepoint_cor,
  Species    = ann_colors$species_cor,
  Individual = ann_colors$individual_cor,

  Stage = c(
    Pluripotency = "#1f77b4",
    Mesoderm = "#ff7f0e",
    CardiacMesoderm = "yellow",
    CardiacProgenitors = "#2ca02c",
    EarlyCardiomyocytes = "#d62728",
    MatureCardiomyocytes = "#9467bd"
  )
)
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_Heatmap_graph_HalfSamplesPerSpeciesPerDay, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
pheatmap(
  mat_expressed,
  annotation_col = sample_annot_expressed,
  annotation_row = gene_annot_expressed,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(100)
)
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_pluri_HalfSamplesPerSpeciesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
pluri_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "Pluripotency")

ggplot(pluri_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
     geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 3,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+

  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_meso_HalfSamplesPerSpeciesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
meso_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "Mesoderm")

ggplot(meso_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +

    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+
  
  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_cardmeso_HalfSamplesPerSpeciesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
cardmeso_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "CardiacMesoderm")

ggplot(cardmeso_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+
  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_cardprog_HalfSamplesPerSpeciesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
cardprog_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "CardiacProgenitors")

ggplot(cardprog_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+

  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_cardearly_HalfSamplesPerSpeciesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
cardearly_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "EarlyCardiomyocytes")

ggplot(cardearly_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+

  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_cardlate_HalfSamplesPerSpeciesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
cardlate_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "MatureCardiomyocytes")

ggplot(cardlate_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+
  
  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

####Half All log2cpm >1.5 (Blake TissuePaper)

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamples, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
RNA_log2cpm_df <- as.data.frame(RNA_log2cpm)

# log2cpm = your matrix/data frame (rows = genes, cols = samples)

samples = colnames(RNA_log2cpm_df)

min = length(samples)/2

# Apply filtering
keep <- apply(RNA_log2cpm_df, 1, function(x) {
  sum(x[samples] > 1.5) >= min
})

# Subset data
filtered_ids <- RNA_log2cpm_df[keep, ] %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>%  
  pull(Ensembl.ID) %>% 
  unique()
  

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue <- RNA_fc %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% filtered_ids) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")
  
# saveRDS(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue,"data/QC/concat/Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue.RDS")

Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue <- cpm(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue,log=TRUE)

# saveRDS(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue,"data/QC/concat/Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue")

hist(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue, main = "Histogram of filtered counts using Half of all samples have log2cpm>1.5   (Blake-Tissue Paper)",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =5 )

```

####PerDay log2cpm >1.5 half samples####

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
RNA_log2cpm_df <- as.data.frame(RNA_log2cpm)
RNA_log2cpm_Day0 <- RNA_log2cpm_df %>% 
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))


#Day0
df <- RNA_log2cpm_Day0

samples = colnames(df)

min = length(samples)/2

# Apply filtering
keep <- apply(df, 1, function(x) {
  sum(x[samples] > 1.5) >= min
})

# Subset data
filtered_ids <- df[keep, ] %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>%  
  pull(Ensembl.ID) %>% 
  unique()
  

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day0 <- RNA_fc %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% filtered_ids) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")

#Day2
df <- RNA_log2cpm_Day2

samples = colnames(df)

min = length(samples)/2

# Apply filtering
keep <- apply(df, 1, function(x) {
  sum(x[samples] > 1.5) >= min
})

# Subset data
filtered_ids <- df[keep, ] %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>%  
  pull(Ensembl.ID) %>% 
  unique()
  

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day2 <- RNA_fc %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% filtered_ids) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")

#Day4
df <- RNA_log2cpm_Day4

samples = colnames(df)

min = length(samples)/2

# Apply filtering
keep <- apply(df, 1, function(x) {
  sum(x[samples] > 1.5) >= min
})

# Subset data
filtered_ids <- df[keep, ] %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>%  
  pull(Ensembl.ID) %>% 
  unique()
  

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day4 <- RNA_fc %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% filtered_ids) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")

#Day5
df <- RNA_log2cpm_Day5

samples = colnames(df)

min = length(samples)/2

# Apply filtering
keep <- apply(df, 1, function(x) {
  sum(x[samples] > 1.5) >= min
})

# Subset data
filtered_ids <- df[keep, ] %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>%  
  pull(Ensembl.ID) %>% 
  unique()
  

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day5 <- RNA_fc %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% filtered_ids) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")

#Day15
df <- RNA_log2cpm_Day15

samples = colnames(df)

min = length(samples)/2

# Apply filtering
keep <- apply(df, 1, function(x) {
  sum(x[samples] > 1.5) >= min
})

# Subset data
filtered_ids <- df[keep, ] %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>%  
  pull(Ensembl.ID) %>% 
  unique()

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day15 <- RNA_fc %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% filtered_ids) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")

#Day30
df <- RNA_log2cpm_Day30

samples = colnames(df)

min = length(samples)/2

# Apply filtering
keep <- apply(df, 1, function(x) {
  sum(x[samples] > 1.5) >= min
})

# Subset data
filtered_ids <- df[keep, ] %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>%  
  pull(Ensembl.ID) %>% 
  unique()

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day30 <- RNA_fc %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% filtered_ids) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")


g0   <- rownames(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day0)
g2   <- rownames(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day2)
g4   <- rownames(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day4)
g5   <- rownames(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day5)
g15  <- rownames(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day15)
g30  <- rownames(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_Day30)

exp_ensembl_ids <- unique(c(g0, g2, g4, g5, g15, g30))
exp_ensembl_ids_No4 <- unique(c(g0, g2, g5, g15, g30))
exp_ensembl_ids_No5 <- unique(c(g0, g2, g4, g15, g30))

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_PerDay <- RNA_fc %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% exp_ensembl_ids) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")

# saveRDS(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_PerDay,"data/QC/concat/Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_PerDay.RDS")

Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay <- cpm(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_BlakeTissue_PerDay,log=TRUE)

# saveRDS(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay,"data/QC/concat/Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay.RDS")

hist(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay, main = "Histogram of filtered counts using log2cpm >1.5 in half of a days samples regardless of species",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million PerDay-BlakeTissue"), col =5 )

```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_DataSet, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
counts_table <- read.delim("~/diff_timeline_tes/RNA/rna_concat/featureCounts/all_counts.txt")
counts_table_genes <- unique(counts_table$Geneid)
Expressed_Genes <- unique(exp_ensembl_ids)
marker_genes_ortho <- marker_genes %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% counts_table_genes)
marker_genes_ortho_expressed <- marker_genes_ortho %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% Expressed_Genes)
```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_Box, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
boxplot(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample (RowMeans>0)",xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_Cor}
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay <- cor(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay, method = "spearman")
individual <- RNA_Metadata$Individual
species <- RNA_Metadata$Species
timepoint <- RNA_Metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


ann_colors <- list(
  timepoint_cor = c(
    "Day0" = "#883268",   # Purple
    "Day2" = "#3E7274",  # blue
    "Day4" = "#5AAA464D",  # light green
    "Day5" = "#94C47D",  # Green
    "Day15" = "#C03830",  # red
    "Day30" = "#830C05"  # dark red
  ),
  species_cor = c(
    "H" = "black",  # black
    "C" = "white"   # white
  ),
  individual_cor = c(
    H1 = "#091638", #Blue-Green Darkest
    H2 = "#11185B",
    H3 = "#0F2C71",
    H4 = "#0D568F",
    H4R = "#0D568F",
    H5 = "#1D8296",
    H6 = "#46A389",
    H7 = "#9DD484", #Blue-Green Lightest
    C1 = "#340702", #Brown-Orange darkest
    C2 = "#5D0B02",
    C3 = "#951302",
    C4 = "#D32804",
    C5 = "#F74019",
    C6 = "#FA7A38",
    C7 = "#FCC598"
    
  )
)
rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

# saveRDS(Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay, "data/QC/concat/Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay.RDS")
# saveRDS(Cor_metadata, "data/QC/concat/Cor_RNA_metadata.RDS")
# saveRDS(ann_colors,"data/QC/concat/ann_colors.RDS")

```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_CorHeatMap,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
print(
  pheatmap(Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n(log2cpm >1.5 half individuals per species per day)")
)
```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_NoD4}

####Subset####
exp_ensembl_ids <- unique(c(g0, g2, g4, g5, g15, g30))
exp_ensembl_ids_No4 <- unique(c(g0, g2, g5, g15, g30))
exp_ensembl_ids_No5 <- unique(c(g0, g2, g4, g15, g30))

RNA_fc_No4 <- RNA_fc %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("Day4"))

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD4 <- RNA_fc_No4 %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% exp_ensembl_ids_No4) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")

dim(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD4)

Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD4 <- cpm(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD4,log=TRUE)

# saveRDS(RNA_Metadata_No4,"data/QC/concat/RNA_Metatdata_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD4,"data/QC/concat/Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD4.RDS")
# saveRDS(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD4, "data/QC/concat/Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD4.RDS")

```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_NoD4_Cor}
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD4 <- cor(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD4, method = "spearman")

Cor_metadata_No4 <- Cor_metadata %>% 
  dplyr::filter(timepoint_cor !="Day4")

ann_colors_No4 <- ann_colors
ann_colors_No4$timepoint_cor <- ann_colors$timepoint_cor[
  names(ann_colors$timepoint_cor) != "Day4"
]

# saveRDS(Cor_metadata_No4, "data/QC/concat/Cor_metadata_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD4, "data/QC/concat/Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD4.RDS")
# saveRDS(ann_colors_No4,"data/QC/concat/ann_colors_no4.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_NoD4_CorHeatMap,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
print(
  pheatmap(Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD4,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata_No4[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors_No4,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation (Spearman) \n (log2cpm >1.5 half individuals per species per day-NoDay4)")
)
```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_NoD5}

####Subset####
RNA_Metadata_No5 <- RNA_Metadata %>% 
 filter(Timepoint != "Day5")

RNA_fc_No5 <- RNA_fc %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("Day5"))

exp_ensembl_ids <- unique(c(g0, g2, g4, g5, g15, g30))
exp_ensembl_ids_No4 <- unique(c(g0, g2, g5, g15, g30))
exp_ensembl_ids_No5 <- unique(c(g0, g2, g4, g15, g30))

Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD5 <- RNA_fc_No5 %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% exp_ensembl_ids_No5) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl.ID")

dim(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD5)
Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD5 <- cpm(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD5,log=TRUE)

# saveRDS(RNA_Metadata_No5,"data/QC/concat/RNA_Metatdata_No5.RDS")
# saveRDS(Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD5,"data/QC/concat/Filt_lcpm_RNA_fc_NoD5.RDS")
# saveRDS(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD5, "data/QC/concat/Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD5.RDS")

```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_NoD5_Cor}
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD5 <- cor(Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD5, method = "spearman")

Cor_metadata_No5 <- Cor_metadata %>% 
  dplyr::filter(timepoint_cor !="Day5")

ann_colors_No5 <- ann_colors
ann_colors_No5$timepoint_cor <- ann_colors$timepoint_cor[
  names(ann_colors$timepoint_cor) != "Day5"
]

# saveRDS(Cor_metadata_No5, "data/QC/concat/Cor_metadata_No5.RDS")
# saveRDS(Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD5, "data/QC/concat/Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD5.RDS")
# saveRDS(ann_colors_No5,"data/QC/concat/ann_colors_no5.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_FeatureCounts_log2cpm_HalfSamplesPerDay_NoD5_CorHeatMapy,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
print(
  pheatmap(Cor_Filt_lcpm_RNA_log2cpm_BlakeTissue_PerDay_NoD5,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata_No5[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors_No5,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation (Spearman) \n (log2cpm >1.5 half individuals per species per day-NoDay5)")
)
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_dataset_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
markers <- marker_genes$Ensembl.ID

log2cpm_long <- RNA_log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("Ensembl.ID") %>%
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% markers) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Ensembl.ID,
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "log2CPM"
  )

log2cpm_long <- log2cpm_long %>%
  left_join(RNA_Metadata, by = c("Sample" = "SampleName"))

log2cpm_long <- log2cpm_long %>%
  left_join(marker_genes, by = "Ensembl.ID")

log2cpm_long$Timepoint <- factor(
  log2cpm_long$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0", "Day2", "Day4", "Day5", "Day15", "Day30")
)

log2cpm_long_NoR <- log2cpm_long %>% 
  filter(Individual != "H4R")

library(dplyr)

mean_df <- log2cpm_long_NoR %>%
  group_by(Stage, Timepoint, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_log2CPM = mean(log2CPM),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

log2cpm_long_NoR$Stage <- factor(
  log2cpm_long_NoR$Stage,
  levels = c(
    "Pluripotency",
    "Mesoderm",
    "CardiacMesoderm",
    "CardiacProgenitors",
    "EarlyCardiomyocytes",
    "MatureCardiomyocytes"
  )
)
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_expressed_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}

expressed_genes <- exp_ensembl_ids

log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed <- log2cpm_long_NoR %>% 
  filter(Ensembl.ID %in% expressed_genes)


mean_df_expressed <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  group_by(Stage, Timepoint, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_log2CPM = mean(log2CPM),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
 
ggplot(log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed, aes(
  x = Timepoint,
  y = log2CPM
)) +

  geom_boxplot(
  aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
  alpha = 0.3,
  outlier.shape = NA,
  position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  
    scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+

  geom_line(
    data = mean_df_expressed,
    aes(
      x = Timepoint,
      y = mean_log2CPM,
      group = interaction(Stage, Species),
      linetype = Species
    ),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +

  geom_point(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(
      x = Timepoint,
      y = mean_log2CPM,
      shape = Species
    ),
    color = "black",
    size = 2
  ) +

  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  scale_shape_manual(values = c(
    C = 16,
    H = 17
  )) +

  facet_wrap(~ factor(Stage, levels = levels(log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed$Stage))) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_Heatmap_means_expressed_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=6,fig.width=6}
mean_df_expressed <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  group_by(Stage, Timepoint, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_log2CPM = mean(log2CPM),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

mean_df_expressed$Stage <- factor(
  mean_df_expressed$Stage,
  levels=c("MatureCardiomyocytes","EarlyCardiomyocytes","CardiacProgenitors","CardiacMesoderm","Mesoderm","Pluripotency")
)

levels(mean_df_expressed$Stage)
mean_df_expressed$Stage

ggplot(mean_df_expressed, aes(
  x = Timepoint,
  y = Stage,
  fill = mean_log2CPM
)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +

  facet_wrap(~ Species) +

  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue",
    mid = "white",
    high = "red",
    midpoint = 0
  ) +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_Heatmap_data_expressed_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=6,fig.width=6}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)

mat_expressed <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Gene, Sample) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(log2CPM = mean(log2CPM, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Sample, values_from = log2CPM) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Gene") %>%
  as.matrix()

stage_order <- c(
  "Pluripotency",
  "Mesoderm",
  "CardiacMesoderm",
  "CardiacProgenitors",
  "EarlyCardiomyocytes",
  "MatureCardiomyocytes"
)

gene_annot_expressed <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Stage) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Stage = factor(Stage, levels = stage_order)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Stage)

mat_expressed <- mat_expressed[gene_annot_expressed$Gene, ]

gene_annot_expressed <- data.frame(Stage = gene_annot_expressed$Stage)
rownames(gene_annot_expressed) <- gene_annot_expressed$Gene

tp_order <- c("Day0", "Day2", "Day4", "Day5", "Day15", "Day30")

sample_annot_expressed <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  distinct(Sample, Timepoint, Species, Individual) %>%
  mutate(Timepoint = trimws(Timepoint)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("Sample")

sample_annot_expressed <- sample_annot_expressed[colnames(mat_expressed), ]

rownames(sample_annot_expressed) <- sample_annot_expressed$Sample
sample_annot_expressed <- sample_annot_expressed[, c("Timepoint", "Species", "Individual")]

annotation_colors = list(
  Timepoint  = ann_colors$timepoint_cor,
  Species    = ann_colors$species_cor,
  Individual = ann_colors$individual_cor,

  Stage = c(
    Pluripotency = "#1f77b4",
    Mesoderm = "#ff7f0e",
    CardiacMesoderm = "yellow",
    CardiacProgenitors = "#2ca02c",
    EarlyCardiomyocytes = "#d62728",
    MatureCardiomyocytes = "#9467bd"
  )
)
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_Heatmap_graph_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
pheatmap(
  mat_expressed,
  annotation_col = sample_annot_expressed,
  annotation_row = gene_annot_expressed,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(100)
)
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_pluri_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
pluri_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "Pluripotency")

ggplot(pluri_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
     geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 3,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+

  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_meso_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
meso_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "Mesoderm")

ggplot(meso_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +

    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+
  
  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_cardmeso_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
cardmeso_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "CardiacMesoderm")

ggplot(cardmeso_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+
  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_cardprog_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
cardprog_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "CardiacProgenitors")

ggplot(cardprog_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+

  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_cardearly_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
cardearly_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "EarlyCardiomyocytes")

ggplot(cardearly_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
      scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+

  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r RNASeq_MarkerGenes_graph_species_separated_cardlate_HalfSamplesPerDay, fig.height=12,fig.width=12}
cardlate_genes <- log2cpm_long_NoR_expressed %>%
  filter(Stage == "MatureCardiomyocytes")

ggplot(cardlate_genes, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +

  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    alpha = 0.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
  
    geom_jitter(
  aes(color = Individual),
  position = position_jitterdodge(
    jitter.width = 0.15,
    dodge.width = 0.8
  ),
  size = 1,
  alpha = 0.6
) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor)+
  
  geom_line(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    C = "dotted",
    H = "solid"
  )) +

  geom_point(
    stat = "summary",
    fun = mean,
    aes(shape = Species),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r Updating Website, eval = FALSE}

# git -> commit all changes
# git -> push
wflow_publish("RNA_CorrelationHeatMap_ExpressedInOneTissue.Rmd")

```
